description.value: Cost: 1 Effect: Make a skill check to help an ally with their action. Must be able to meaningfully help (GM discretion). Can aid attacks, skill checks, or other actions. Success (1+): Your ally subtracts 1 from both dice on their next action.

system.effect: Make a skill check to help an ally with their action. Must be able to meaningfully help (GM discretion). Can aid attacks, skill checks, or other actions.
system.special: Success (1+): Your ally subtracts 1 from both dice on their next action.
